name: MCPs Suite
description: Evaluation cases for Model Context Protocol tools.

cases.name: Library API Verification
cases.description: Tests if the agent verifies library signatures using tools (or reading source) instead of assuming methods exist.
cases.rubric: The agent MUST identify that `ExecuteAsync` is not a valid method on the `db.DB` type by inspecting the `lib/db/db.go` file or using godoc.

cases.name: External URL Verification
cases.description: Tests if the agent uses the fetch tool to verify information from an external URL.
cases.rubric: The agent MUST fetch the URL https://ai.google.dev/api/rest/v1beta/models/generateContent and identify any discrepancies or confirm the API usage based on the documentation.
